planData: {"testCases":[{"name":"Open SauceDemo Website","description":"Verify that the SauceDemo website opens successfully.","prerequisites":[],"steps":["Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com","Assert that the page title is 'Swag Labs'"]},{"name":"Positive Login","description":"Verify that a user can log in with valid credentials.","prerequisites":["Open SauceDemo Website"],"steps":["Enter 'standard_user' in the username field","Enter 'secret_sauce' in the password field","Click the login button","Assert that the user is redirected to the inventory page","Assert that the inventory page displays a list of products"]},{"name":"Negative Login","description":"Verify that a user cannot log in with invalid credentials.","prerequisites":["Open SauceDemo Website"],"steps":["Enter 'invalid_user' in the username field","Enter 'invalid_password' in the password field","Click the login button","Assert that an error message is displayed indicating invalid credentials"]},{"name":"Add Item to Cart","description":"Verify that a user can add an item to the cart.","prerequisites":["Positive Login"],"steps":["Select an item from the inventory list","Click the 'Add to cart' button for the selected item","Assert that the cart icon displays '1' indicating one item in the cart"]},{"name":"Open Cart and Proceed to Checkout","description":"Verify that a user can open the cart and proceed to checkout.","prerequisites":["Add Item to Cart"],"steps":["Click on the cart icon","Assert that the cart page displays the added item","Click the 'Checkout' button","Assert that the user is redirected to the checkout information page"]},{"name":"Fill Checkout Information","description":"Verify that a user can fill in the checkout information.","prerequisites":["Open Cart and Proceed to Checkout"],"steps":["Enter 'John' in the first name field","Enter 'Doe' in the last name field","Enter '12345' in the postal code field","Click the 'Continue' button","Assert that the user is redirected to the checkout overview page"]},{"name":"Checkout Overview and Assert","description":"Verify that the checkout overview displays the correct information.","prerequisites":["Fill Checkout Information"],"steps":["Assert that the checkout overview page displays the correct item details","Assert that the total price is
